examples: That night she had a poem that might not be a prizewinner but sounded good enough.
Doing well is not enough; she has to be a prominent prizewinner.
A prizewinner at international expositions, Gatti specialized in decorative objects with elaborate, inlaid ivory ornament.
Like every other Nobel Prizewinner so far this year, he is an American.
Poland's two great poets studied there: Adam Mickiewicz nearly two centuries ago, and in the pre-war years Czeslaw Milosz, a Nobel prizewinner.
